title: Orderbook settlement over-credits taxed tokens and can poison pool solvency
reason: Duplicate of existing finding `F-004`, which already covers over-crediting on both `provideLiquidity` and `receiveTokenFromOrderbook`.

title: Owner emergency withdrawal is an unbounded rug lever that leaves LP state insolvent
reason: `emergencyWithdraw` / `emergencyWithdrawETH` are explicit `onlyOwner` escape hatches; absent a contrary trust model, this is an acknowledged privileged capability rather than a code vulnerability.

title: `minTokenAmount` does not provide the advertised slippage protection
reason: The parameter is indeed redundant and misleading, but by itself it does not create a distinct protocol-level loss or lockup beyond the already-reported reserve-manipulation issue in `F-003`.
